description.en: Execute JavaScript in the current browser tab and return the result.
description.es: Execute JavaScript in the current browser tab and return the result.
description.fr: Execute JavaScript in the current browser tab and return the result.
description.ro: Execute JavaScript in the current browser tab and return the result.
description.it: Execute JavaScript in the current browser tab and return the result.

description.en: JavaScript function to evaluate in the page context. Must be a function declaration, e.g. function() { return document.title; }
description.es: JavaScript function to evaluate in the page context. Must be a function declaration, e.g. function() { return document.title; }
description.fr: JavaScript function to evaluate in the page context. Must be a function declaration, e.g. function() { return document.title; }
description.ro: JavaScript function to evaluate in the page context. Must be a function declaration, e.g. function() { return document.title; }
description.it: JavaScript function to evaluate in the page context. Must be a function declaration, e.g. function() { return document.title; }
